lookup 时按下方「字典源优先级」自顶向下遍历，每源内自顶向下首个命中即停。: On lookup, traverse the sources top-down by priority; within each source, stop at the first hit top-down.

「仅分析未注音字符」保留已有注音，补充缺失的。: 'Only un-rubied chars' keeps existing ruby and fills missing.

'Keep existing ruby' uses @Ruby from the file.
'Re-analyze all' clears existing ruby and uses auto analysis.
'Only un-rubied chars' keeps existing ruby and fills missing.
「全部重新分析」会覆盖现有注音。\n「仅分析未注音字符」会保留已有的人工/字典注:
'Re-analyze all' overwrites existing ruby.
'Only un-rubied' keeps existing manual/dictionary ruby.

删除当前字符全部节奏点并取消句尾标记（cc=0，is_sentence_end=: Delete all checkpoints of current character and clear sentence-end (cc=0, is_sentence_end=False)

删除节奏点时跳转到该时间戳前的毫秒数: Milliseconds before the timestamp to jump to when deleting a checkpoint
加载歌词时，若未检测到日文假名则自动切换为中文模式（汉字每字一个节奏点，跳过日文: When loading lyrics, if no Japanese kana is detected, auto-switch to Chinese mode (one checkpoint per kanji, skip Japanese ruby)

取消所有节奏点、清除时间戳并标记为句尾: Clear all checkpoints, wipe timestamps, mark as sentence end
固定特定词汇的注音读法（最长匹配优先）: Fix the reading of specific words (longest match wins)
在当前字符的多个节奏点之间反向循环切换（Alt+←）: Cycle backward through the current character's checkpoints (Alt+←)
在当前字符的多个节奏点之间循环切换（Alt+→）: Cycle through the current character's checkpoints (Alt+→)

- ASS subtitles

- KRA

已关闭代理 —— 应用将直接访问网络。: Proxy off — the app will access the network directly.
已分析所选范围的注音: Analyzed ruby for the selected range
已将第 {line} 句 第 {s}-{e} 字连为一个词: Linked chars {s}-{e} of line {line} into one word
已将第 {line} 行第 {start}~{end} 字的演唱者更改: Changed singer for chars {start}~{end} of line {line}
已有拉取任务在进行中: A fetch task is already running
已根据注音更新 {lines} 行的节奏点: Updated checkpoints of {lines} lines based on ruby
已请求管理员权限启动 FFmpeg 安装: Requested admin rights to launch FFmpeg install
应用启动后在后台轻量检查 GitHub Release，发现新版本时弹窗提示: After startup, lightly check GitHub Release in background; notify on new version
应用启动时检查所有启用的网络源是否到期，到期则后台自动拉取: On startup, check whether enabled network sources are due; auto-fetch in background if so
建议用下方的offset校正来矫正，用于设备引起的反应延迟（负值=提前，正值=延: Use the Offset calibration below to compensate device latency (negative = earlier, positive = later)
开启后即便使用 LLM 注音，用户词典条目仍以最高优先级覆盖；关闭则完全以 LL: When on, user-dictionary entries still override at highest priority even with LLM ruby; when off, use LLM result only
开启后无爆音，但倍速切换可能有延迟，且需占用 .cache 进行离线预渲染；关闭: When ON, no audio clipping, but speed switching may have latency and requires .cache for offline pre-rendering. When OFF, smaller .cache usage and instant switching, but possible clipping. Default ON.
开启后注音改用 LLM（整首一次发送、保留上下文），跳过 WinRT/Sudac: When ON, ruby generation uses LLM (full lyrics sent at once with context). Skips WinRT/Sudachi/pykakasi. On failure, falls back to local engine.
开启后注音时叠加网络词典源的条目（按优先级链）；关闭则仅使用本地词典。: When on, layer network dictionary entries during ruby (by priority); when off, use only the local dictionary.
开启后，用户词典中纯片假名词条或读音为英文的词条将被应用；关闭时拦截这类词条: When on, pure-katakana entries or English-reading entries in user dict are applied; when off, such entries are blocked
当前字符没有时间戳，无法确定间隔终点。: Current character has no timestamp; cannot determine interval end.

您可以稍后在设置中重新检查更新: You can check for updates later in Settings

打开校准弹窗，跟随节拍器按空格键测量 Offset: Open the calibration dialog; press space to a metronome to measure Offset
打轴播放时在当前行以光标为锚用过渡色提示上一个/正在/下一个打的字；具体透明度与: During timing playback, use the cursor as anchor on the current line with gradient color to indicate previous/current/next characters; opacity and toggles are customizable in 'Preview guide style' below

打轴时歌词预览是否跟随播放位置自动滚动: Whether the lyrics preview auto-scrolls with playback during tagging
打轴时间戳的速度修正系数: Speed correction factor for tagged timestamps
批量编辑暂不允许多行选择: Bulk edit does not yet support multi-line
拉取后的 entries 在此处直接编辑。顺序自顶向下递减优先级；新增条目默认置: Edit fetched entries directly here. Order goes top-down by decreasing priority; new entries are added on top.

Edit fetched entries directly here. Order goes top-down by decreasing priority; new entries are added on top.
Ruby format: {source||seg1,seg2,...} (| splits mora, , splits chars within a block; empty seg = no ruby).
按字符编辑（注音用半角逗号分隔 RubyPart；节奏点为非负整数）:: Edit per character (use half-width comma to separate RubyParts; checkpoints are non-negative integers):
按字符编辑（注音用半角逗号分隔 RubyPart；节奏点为非负整数）。\n字符数:
Edit per character (use half-width comma to separate RubyParts; checkpoints are non-negative integers).
Same char count as the search → keep timestamps; different → lose all matched timestamps.
按空格键跟拍，可持续任意次数，关闭窗口前都会保持运行: Press Space to tap along; can run any number of times; keeps running until you close the window
按顺序尝试，前一项失败时自动降级到下一项。\n你可以拖动条目，或选中条目后用右侧: Try in order; on failure, fall back to next. Drag items or use ↑/↓ on the right to reorder.

本功能用于所有打轴过程完成后，自动查找需要补轴点的字符（仅无普通时间戳字符），查:
After all tagging is done, this function automatically finds characters needing a fill (only those without a regular timestamp) and evenly distributes the average of surrounding timestamps.

Boundary handling: if the row head has no preceding timestamp, find the next forward and subtract the 'head deduct' value; if the row tail has no following timestamp, find the next backward and add the 'tail add' value.
条目缓存：network_dictionary.json（与 config.js: Entry cache: network_dictionary.json (same directory as config.json)
查看和编辑所有歌词行的打轴数据: View and edit timing data of all lyrics lines
标记某字符前需要插入导唱符时显示的符号（叠加在字符左上角，红色半透明）: Symbol shown when a character needs a guide symbol inserted before it (translucent red, top-left)
根据用户词典给片假名标注英文: Annotate katakana with English using the user dictionary

正数：所有原始时间戳向后移；负数：向前移。: Positive: shift all raw timestamps later. Negative: shift earlier.
正数：所选字符原始时间戳向后移；负数：向前移。: Positive: shift selected chars' raw timestamps later. Negative: shift earlier.
正数：该行所有原始时间戳向后移；负数：向前移。: Positive: shift this line's raw timestamps later. Negative: shift earlier.
每一行开头都插入演唱者名称标签（需先启用「插入【演唱者名】标签」）: Insert singer-name tag at the start of every line (enable 'Insert [singer name] tag' first)
每次点击「应用」立即执行偏移，可叠加多次操作。: Each click 'Apply' applies the offset immediately and can be stacked.
每行至少需要保留 1 个字符: At least 1 character per line is required
没有启用且 URL 非空的源: No enabled source with a non-empty URL
注音格式：{原文||段1,段2,...}（块内 | 分 mora、, 分字符；空:
Ruby format: {source||seg1,seg2,...} (| splits mora, , splits chars within a block; empty seg = no ruby).
Example: {微笑||ほほ,え}ん  /  {大冒険||だ|い,ぼ|う,け|ん}
Click the button on the right to choose an audio file...

直接应用（用逗号手动分段，无逗号则不分段）: Apply directly (manual split by comma; no comma = no split)
确定要从前 Karaoke Studio 的 settings.json 导入配:
Import settings from Karaoke Studio's settings.json?

The following will be extracted and merged into current SUG config:
  - Main settings (playback, timing, UI, shortcuts, etc.)
  - Dictionary
  - Singer presets
  - Network dict cache
  - UI theme
  - Updater settings

KS config values will take priority.
确定要删除所有时间戳吗？此操作可撤销。: Delete all timestamps? This can be undone.
确定要删除所有时间戳（保留行首）吗？此操作可撤销。: Delete all timestamps (keep line start)? This can be undone.
确定要将所有设置重置为默认值吗？\n这将覆盖您当前的设置（用户词典和演唱者预设不:
Reset all settings to defaults?
This overwrites your current settings (user dict and singer presets are unaffected).
立即从所选源拉取最新发布信息（不受启动检查间隔限制）: Fetch latest release info from selected source now (not limited by startup interval)
符号已有时间戳（cc=1）时，将其时间戳前移的量；\n同时将原始符号时间戳赋给紧:
If a symbol has a timestamp (cc=1), the amount to advance it,
and transfer the original symbol timestamp to the immediately following non-symbol char without a timestamp
符号无普通时间戳（cc=0）但有句尾停顿时，将句尾时间戳后移的量: If a symbol has no regular timestamp (cc=0) but has a sentence-end pause, the amount to delay the sentence-end timestamp
第 {line} 行原始时间戳已整体偏移 {delta:+d} ms: Raw timestamps of line {line} shifted by {delta:+d} ms
第 {rows}{more} 行的注音不符合 annotated 格式或 raw: Ruby of line(s) {rows}{more} doesn't match the annotated format or raw_text disagrees with the word; those lines may be ignored when matching. Save is still possible.
管理演唱者：双击编辑；Ctrl/Shift 多选可批量操作；拖动可调整顺序。: Manage singers: double-click to edit; Ctrl/Shift for multi-select; drag to reorder.
管理网络词典源（含 RL 官方 )，可添加自定义 URL、查看条目: Manage network dictionary sources (incl. RL official). Add custom URLs and view entries.
编辑器内容已还原为项目当前状态: Editor content reverted to current project state
编辑模式下打轴（备用键）：记录当前进度条时间戳至当前节奏点【仅编辑模式】: Tag in edit mode (alt. key): record progress-bar timestamp to current checkpoint [edit only]
编辑模式下打轴：记录当前进度条时间戳至当前节奏点【仅编辑模式】: Tag in edit mode: record progress-bar timestamp to current checkpoint [edit only]

自动安装未完成（可能未授权 UAC 或下载失败）。可按下面的方式手动安装：: Auto-install did not finish (UAC declined or download failed). Try manual install below:
自动检测未发现可用代理。如确有代理在运行，请改用「手动指定地址」。: No proxy found via auto-detect. If one is running, use 'Manual' instead.
自动注音完成后，自动删除指定类型的注音: After auto-ruby, automatically delete ruby of specified types
自动滚动 — 操作后挂起 6 秒自动恢复: Auto — pause 6s after action, then resume
自定义节奏点标记的显示字符（首节奏点 / 后续 / 句尾，已打轴 / 未打轴）: Customize checkpoint marker characters (first / subsequent / sentence-end, tagged / un-tagged)
节奏点标记顶端与主文字底部的垂直间距（增大避免大字号时被文字遮挡）: Vertical spacing between the checkpoint marker top and main-text bottom (increase to avoid overlap with large fonts)
若全部未连词，则将除最后一个字符外的向后连词全部勾选；否则全部取消连词: If none is linked, check all forward links except for the last char; otherwise uncheck all
行尾字符无后方时间戳时，向前找到第一个时间戳后加上此值: If the line-end character has no following timestamp, find the first one backward and add this value
行首字符无前方时间戳时，向后找到第一个时间戳后减去此值: If the line-start character has no preceding timestamp, find the first one forward and subtract this value
行高 = (当前行字体 + 注音 + 注音间距 + 节奏点)高度 × 系数: Line height = (current-line font + ruby + spacing + checkpoint) height × factor
被删除演唱者的歌词将转移到以下演唱者：: Lyrics of removed singers will be transferred to:
记录当前节奏点时间戳，同时删除下一个节奏点本身（减少 check_count），: Record current checkpoint timestamp and delete the next checkpoint (decrement check_count); the cursor jumps to the original 3rd checkpoint [timing only]
设置后，导出时将始终优先使用此目录。\n留空则不启用，导出时自动使用最近加载的文:
When set, exports will always prefer this directory.
Empty = disabled; exports use the directory of the most recently loaded file.
设置固定读音的词汇。词典中的词将以子串严格匹配方式覆盖自动注音（最高优先级）。\:
Set fixed-reading vocabulary. Dictionary words override auto-ruby by strict substring match (highest priority).
Priority decreases top to bottom; new entries default to top (highest priority).
Ruby format: {source||seg1,seg2,...} (| splits mora, , splits chars within a block; empty seg = no ruby).
Example: {微笑||ほほ,え}ん  /  {大冒険||だ|い,ぼ|う,け|ん}

调整本地词典与各网络源的全局优先级（自顶向下递减）: Adjust the global priority of local and network dictionaries (top-down)
起点 {start}ms 不早于终点 {end}ms，间隔无效。: Start {start}ms is not before end {end}ms; interval is invalid.
距上次检查不足该时长时，启动期不再发起请求（手动检查不受限）: If less than this duration has passed since last check, do not request at startup (manual checks unrestricted)
距上次自动同步超过此间隔后，下次启动触发后台拉取: Once this interval has passed since last auto-sync, the next startup triggers a background fetch

输入字体名称过滤（支持中/日/韩文名）…: Type a font name to filter (CN/JA/KR names supported)…
输入演唱者名称进行过滤: Type a singer name to filter
还剩 {n} 个标记点未添加导唱符。: {n} markers still missing a guide symbol.
连接到下一字符（末字/行尾不可连词，提交时将跳过并提示；句尾=停顿点，允许连词）: Link to next character (last char/line end cannot be linked — skipped and warned on submit; sentence end = pause, can be linked)
连词/取消连词；划选多个字符时：全未连词则整段连为一个词，否则整段取消连词: Link/unlink. With multiple chars selected: if none linked, link the whole range; otherwise unlink it all.
连词合并为一行；除「字符」外各列均用逗号「,」分隔\n双击可编辑「字符」「注音」:
Linked words merge into one row; columns other than 'Char' are comma-separated.
Double-click to edit Char/Ruby/Checkpoints/SentenceEnd/Timetags/Singer.
Checkpoints: one entry per char (e.g. 2,2,1); their sum is the row checkpoint total K.
Ruby: one segment per mora, flattened across the row; segment count must equal K. Empty = no ruby for the whole row, no auto re-split.
Timetags: one entry per checkpoint, aligned to K; empty segments (,,) allowed. The sentence-end release point goes last; total must not exceed K(+1 for sentence end).
SentenceEnd column: 'Yes' marks sentence end (separate release time), empty cancels. Singer is one entry per char.
选择启用哪些自动节奏点规则: Choose which auto-checkpoint rules to enable
选择哪些字符类型自动生成节奏点: Choose which character types auto-generate checkpoints
选择或输入分组名称（留空则清除分组）：: Pick or type a group name (empty = clear group):
选择服务商的接口形态：Chat Completions 覆盖大多数（含本地 Ol: Choose provider API format: Chat Completions covers most cases (incl. local Ollama/LM Studio). Anthropic uses /v1/messages. Responses uses /v1/responses (OpenAI new API).
选择界面主题，或设为自动跟随系统切换: Choose UI theme, or follow system automatically
选择要删除注音的字符类型：: Choose character types of ruby to delete:
选择要设置演唱者的行：点击切换选择，Shift+点击范围选择，然后从下方选择演唱: Choose lines to set singer for: click to toggle, Shift+click for range; then pick a singer below and click 'Apply':
逐行编辑整篇歌词。格式：{原文||读音} 为注音块，注音块中`|` 分 Ruby: Edit the whole lyrics line by line. Format: {source||reading} is a ruby block; `|` splits RubyParts and `,` splits chars inside; timestamps go before the char [m:ss.cc] (empty = [T]); sentence-end [>…] goes after the char; singer changes use [name].
部分演唱者分组未能更新: Some singer groups could not be updated
部分演唱者未能启用: Some singers could not be enabled
部分演唱者状态未能更新: Some singer states could not be updated
部分连词设置未应用: Some link settings were not applied
配置文件将保存到: {path}: Config file will be saved to: {path}
针对选中的符号分组，自动处理时间戳：\n• 后补偿：符号无普通时间戳（cc=0）:
For the selected symbol groups, process timestamps automatically:
• Backward compensation: when a symbol has no regular timestamp (cc=0) but a sentence-end pause mark, promote the pause time to a regular timestamp and delay the sentence-end timestamp by 'backward'.
• Forward compensation: when a symbol has a timestamp (cc=1) and the next non-symbol char has none (cc=0), transfer the symbol's timestamp to that char and advance the symbol's timestamp by 'forward'.
隐藏 current 域和 focus 域的 hitbox 高亮背景；启用后仅在: Hide hitbox highlight backgrounds for current and focus domains; when enabled, focus domain highlight only shows during drag selection
需要安装日语注音组件: Japanese ruby component needs to be installed
非当前行的歌词字体像素大小: Pixel size of font for non-current lyrics lines
音频加载后的初始播放速度: Initial playback speed after audio loads
音频文件（打轴需要，可后续添加）: Audio file (required for tagging; can be added later)
项目中没有可用的演唱者: No singer available in the project
项目中没有演唱者，请先添加演唱者: No singer in the project; please add one first
项目有未保存的更改，是否在退出前保存？: Project has unsaved changes. Save before exit?
（编辑后点「应用更改」写回；行号对应歌词行，时间轴随文本保留）: (After editing, click 'Apply changes' to write back. Line numbers map to lyrics lines; timestamps follow the text.)
注音分析所选字符（更新节奏点）: Analyze ruby of selected chars (update checkpoints)
注音分析所选字符（不更新节奏点）: Analyze ruby of selected chars (keep checkpoints)
已为 {lines} 行自动分析注音（保留现有节奏点）: Auto-analyzed ruby for {lines} lines (existing checkpoints kept)
